tool.name: Data Assembler
tool.description: Assembles data from reflectivity, parquet files, and analyzer model into a single AI-ready output.

param.name: config_json
param.label: JSON Configuration
param.help: A JSON file with assembler options.

configfiles.configfile: import json, sys with open(sys.argv[1]) as f: d = json.load(f) with open('_env.sh', 'w') as f: f.write('export OUTPUT_DIR="%s/assembled"\n' % d.get('output_directory', 'output'))

tool.command: #if $config_json python '$parse_config_script' '$config_json' && . _env.sh && #else export OUTPUT_DIR='output/assembled' && #end if mkdir -p \$OUTPUT_DIR && mkdir parquet && tar -xzvf $parquet -C parquet && data-assembler ingest -r $reflectivity -p parquet -m $model -o output > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2) && tar -czvf $out_gz -C output .
